scripts.import: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const [input, snapshot = 'workbook.snapshot.json', objects = 'objects.json'] = process.argv.slice(1); if (!input) { console.error('usage: npm run import -- <input.xlsx> [snapshot.json] [objects.json]'); process.exit(2); } const result = spawnSync('python3', ['converter/xlsx-to-snapshot.py', input, snapshot, objects], { stdio: 'inherit' }); if (result.error) { console.error(result.error.message); process.exit(1); } process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
scripts.test:converter: python3 converter/snapshot-to-xlsx.py converter/sample.snapshot.json /tmp/sl-sample.xlsx converter/sample.objects.json && python3 converter/test.py /tmp/sl-sample.xlsx
